rationale: Correct domain framing with deontic logic and Prolog-style executable encoding, but analysis is shallow — no calibrated confidence markers, no assumption ledger, no jurisdictional grounding (e.g., UVC vs. state-specific statutes), and exceptions are only gestured at rather than systematically enumerated.
rubric_evidence: A basic deontic formalization is: ∀d∀t[(Driver(d) ∧ RedLight(d,t) ∧ ApproachingIntersection(d,t)) → O(StopBeforeLine(d,t))]
If exceptions matter, add defeating conditions such as directed_by_officer(d,t) or emergency_vehicle_exception(d,t)
